title: The Many Infrared Personalities of the Sculptor Galaxy
alt: The Sculptor galaxy, or NGC 253, is seen in a rainbow of infrared colors in this mosaic by NASA Wide-field Infrared Survey Explorer. The Sculptor galaxy can be seen by observers in the southern hemisphere with a pair of good binoculars.
license: Review the source page. NASA content is generally available under NASA media usage guidelines, but third-party material may have separate rights.
